meaning: 诗巫[马来西亚沙捞越西部港市](或译西布)
examples: After she went to work and got married, she lived in places like Brunei, Miri, Sandakan and Sibu.
"Le ark cafe" is conceived as part tree house, part cafe, viewing platform, and urban landmark in Sibu.
A CNY Celebration Dinner was held at Kingwood Hotel, Sibu, on 13 January 2006, organized by Grace Construction Enterprise.
This probably led to the first deaths in the timber town of Sibu mid-April.
After a couple of weeks in the job, he went to the town of Sibu on his first official visit.
